subject: Update Gizmo and Champ security config
commit_message:
Update Gizmo and Champ security config

- Update rProxy to use AAF geo-locate endpoint rather than hard coded IP
address
- Update fProxy to use separate truststore
- Restructure charts to reduce certificate duplication

Change-Id: I1e63ceb0ebabd8bb3dfacc71dac841858279b6f1
Issue-ID: AAF-718
Signed-off-by: Lee, Tian (tl5884) <TianL@amdocs.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Uploaded patch set 2.

Patch Set 2:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/1471/

Patch Set 2:

Hi Borislav,

I have made some amendments in a new patchset to add some missing config, but I have not yet moved the common certificates up into the parent chart.

Since other securitized microservices (e.g. aai-resources) are all following the same structure (with certificates in the child charts), may I suggest that you merge this change first, and we will follow up with a subsequent changelist where we will update all securitized microservices to source their common certificates from the parent chart?

Patch Set 2: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/1471/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/1471

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

> Hi Borislav,
 > 
 > I have made some amendments in a new patchset to add some missing
 > config, but I have not yet moved the common certificates up into
 > the parent chart.
 > 
 > Since other securitized microservices (e.g. aai-resources) are all
 > following the same structure (with certificates in the child
 > charts), may I suggest that you merge this change first, and we
 > will follow up with a subsequent changelist where we will update
 > all securitized microservices to source their common certificates
 > from the parent chart?

Sorry, no. I prefer you first make order with all those p.12 files and then add support in other services in a proper way.
Also, I would like to issue a discussion regarding all this fproxy and rproxy features. I feel they clutter aai charts and need to make sure we are doing the right thing. Mike, for your consideration.

Patch Set 2:

> > Hi Borislav,
 > >
 > > I have made some amendments in a new patchset to add some missing
 > > config, but I have not yet moved the common certificates up into
 > > the parent chart.
 > >
 > > Since other securitized microservices (e.g. aai-resources) are
 > all
 > > following the same structure (with certificates in the child
 > > charts), may I suggest that you merge this change first, and we
 > > will follow up with a subsequent changelist where we will update
 > > all securitized microservices to source their common certificates
 > > from the parent chart?
 > 
 > Sorry, no. I prefer you first make order with all those p.12 files
 > and then add support in other services in a proper way.
 > Also, I would like to issue a discussion regarding all this fproxy
 > and rproxy features. I feel they clutter aai charts and need to
 > make sure we are doing the right thing. Mike, for your
 > consideration.

Hi Borislav,

I appreciate your concern about the duplication of the p12s, but as things stand now, Gizmo and Champ will not start up when deployed with OOM, because they need these config changes in place.

Restructuring the charts to reduce duplication is a valid suggestion, but it is not a trivial task and we would have to take this into our sprint as a new story to be completed in order of priority.

So in the mean time, while acknowledging that this is not the perfect solution, it would at least allow Gizmo and Champ to function again.
Uploaded patch set 3.

Patch Set 3:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/1549/

Patch Set 3:

The sidecar certs are now located under the parent aai charts.

Gizmo and Champ are now referencing the same certs in the parent location.

Existing securitised microservices can be updated to make use of the parent certs, as can all future securitized microservices.
